title: Senior Python Backend Developer
description: 🌍 About Indivd At Indivd, we build a privacy-first analytics platform that helps retailers, shopping malls, and public spaces understand how people move and interact in physical environments. We bridge the gap between physical and digital analytics by turning real-world activity into actionable insights, all while respecting user privacy. Our product is already used globally and continues to grow as more organizations look for smarter and more responsible ways to understand their spaces. 📝 The Role We’re looking for a Senior Python Backend Engineer to join Indivd and own critical parts of our backend. This is a hands-on, high-impact role where you’ll shape core systems, make real technical decisions, and see your work in production quickly. You’ll work with a small, experienced team that values autonomy, trust, and getting things done. 🔧 What You’ll Do Design and build scalable backend systems that power our product Develop and maintain APIs and core services Own system performance, reliability, and long-term maintainability Work closely with product and engineering to turn ideas into production-ready solutions Take full ownership of backend decisions from design to delivery 🎯 What We’re Looking For 7+ years of professional backend engineering experience Strong proficiency Python Solid understanding of backend system design and APIs Experience working with databases (SQL and NoSQL) Comfortable working in Linux-based environments Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently Fluent level of English (interviews will be held in English) 💜 Why You’ll Love It at Indivd Small, multicultural team that moves fast and owns what it builds Fully remote work with flexible hours and real autonomy 35 paid days off per year Budget for learning, growth, and skill development

title: Senior Backend Software Engineer
description: Mid‑Level / Senior Backend Engineer (Java/Kotlin, Spring) We’re hiring an experienced backend engineer to design, build, and operate scalable services using Java and Kotlin on the Spring ecosystem. You will own API design and architecture, implement resilient microservices and modular monoliths, and help shape CI/CD, observability, and platform practices across the team. Responsibilities Design and implement backend services and APIs using Java and/or Kotlin with Spring Framework Architect and evolve systems as modular monoliths or microservices depending on product needs Build robust data access layers using JPA/Hibernate and Spring Data, including JPA Specifications for complex queries Secure services with Spring Security and implement authentication/authorization patterns Integrate streaming and caching technologies such as Kafka and Redis for eventing and performance Implement real‑time features using WebSocket and related patterns Containerize and operate services with Docker and Kubernetes; collaborate on deployment and CI/CD processes Automate CI/CD pipelines and workflows using GitHub Actions Document APIs with OpenAPI / springdoc and maintain clear API contracts Collaborate on architecture decisions, design patterns, and code reviews to ensure maintainability and high code quality Troubleshoot production issues , optimize performance, and contribute to monitoring and alerting Core Requirements Languages & Frameworks Java (21/25) and Kotlin: Production experience in at least one; comfortable reading and contributing in both. Expertise in recent Java features like lambdas, streaming framework, records etc. Spring ecosystem: Spring Boot, Spring Data, Spring Security, Spring Web Architecture & Design Strong DSA skills, OOP, SOLID principles, and Design Patterns API design and architecture (RESTful design, versioning, error handling, pagination) Experience with modular monoliths and microservices: Tradeoffs, service boundaries, inter‑service communication Infrastructure & DevOps Docker and Kubernetes: Building images, manifests, deployments, and troubleshooting pods GitHub Actions: Building CI/CD workflows, release pipelines, and automated checks Data & Integration SQL and PostgreSQL: Schema design, indexing, query optimization JPA / Hibernate / Spring Data JPA: Mappings, caching, lazy/eager loading, and JPA Specifications Kafka: Producers, consumers, topics, partitioning, and at‑least‑once vs exactly‑once considerations Redis: Caching patterns, pub/sub, and data structures Protocols & Paradigms Deep understanding of HTTP, REST, and Web fundamentals WebSocket experience for real‑time features Moderate knowledge of gRPC Functional programming concepts and paradigm: Immutability, pure functions, streams, and reactive thinking where applicable. Quality & Practices Automated testing (Unit, integration, contract tests) Code reviews, CI, and observability (Metrics, logging, tracing) Good communication skills and ability to work in cross‑functional teams Nice to Have: Vaadin Java UI framework ClickHouse DB experience ETL design and data pipeline experience Thymeleaf or server‑side templating experience Familiarity with AI automation tools such as n8n, Windmill, or similar workflow automation platforms Experience with OpenAPI advanced features and API gateways Expectations: Mid‑Level vs Senior Mid‑Level Experience: ~3–5 years building backend services with Java/Kotlin and Spring Scope: Owns features end‑to‑end with guidance; contributes to design discussions; writes reliable, tested code. Impact: Improves components, identifies bugs and performance issues, and participates in on‑call rotations. Senior Experience: 5+ years with demonstrable system design and delivery of complex services Scope: Leads architecture for subsystems, defines standards and best practices. Impact: Drives cross‑team initiatives, improves platform reliability and scalability, influences product and technical roadmaps. Interview Process & Sample Questions Process: CV screen → Technical take‑home or coding exercise → System design interview → Team/behavioral interview → Offer Sample technical questions: Design a resilient microservice for order processing that uses Kafka for events and PostgreSQL for state. Explain schema, topics, and failure handling. Implement a paginated REST API with filtering using Spring Data JPA and JPA Specifications; discuss performance considerations. Explain how you would secure a set of microservices with Spring Security and token‑based auth. Describe how you would migrate a monolith to a modular monolith or microservices architecture; list tradeoffs. Troubleshooting: A service in Kubernetes shows high latency. Walk through your debugging steps and metrics to inspect. Coding exercise ideas Small Spring Boot service exposing CRUD endpoints, with tests, OpenAPI docs, and a GitHub Actions workflow for build/test What We Offer and How to Apply What we offer: Challenging problems, modern stack, collaborative team, remote full-time work model, flexible work arrangements, and professional development support. How to apply: Send your CV and a short note about a recent system you designed or a technical challenge you solved to the hiring contact or application portal. Include links to GitHub, open‑source contributions, or architecture diagrams if available. Key tags: Java; Kotlin; Spring Boot; Spring Data; Spring Security; JPA/Hibernate; PostgreSQL; Kafka; Redis; WebSocket; Docker; Kubernetes; GitHub Actions; OpenAPI; Microservices; Modular Monolith; Functional Programming.

title: Senior PHP Developer
description: ABOUT Jotform Jotform is a San Francisco-based SaaS company with more than 35 million users worldwide. We are thriving and growing, and we’ve never needed outside funding. That’s because we like keeping things agile, independent and fun. Jotform believes everyone should be able to create their own online forms. Our 10,000+ ready-made form templates, 100+ integrations and more than 380 widgets have made us one of the most popular online form builders for organizations of all sizes — from small businesses to enterprises. Since our inception in 2006, our mission has been to help users create, manage and share online forms and receive responses in the easiest way possible. ABOUT THE ROLE Jotform is seeking a Senior PHP Developer in our Ankara office, located at a relaxed fun environment in Hacettepe University Teknokent. As a rapidly growing company we are hiring for similar positions continuously and once an opportunity matches with your qualifications, we will contact you immediately. Here’s what you will be doing: Work closely with product management, front end developers, devOps and designers Design, build and deploy new features for Jotform Deliver solutions in a continuous integration flow to production having 35 million users Review and iterate architecture to ensure scale along with the growth Education & Work Experience & Technical Requirements: BS Degree in Computer Science/Engineering or related technical field or equivalent practical experience 5+ year experience building web applications Proficiency in PHP Familiarity with Distributed Systems programming Experience in SaaS and high traffic applications are highly preferred Understanding of HTML, CSS, Javascript, React and other web technologies Solid understanding of OOP principles Working experience with CI/CD and related tools like Git and Jenkins Ability to write high-performance, maintainable and reusable code Excellent command of English Personal Specifications/Skills: Demonstrated ability to work independently with minimal supervision A passion to learn and keep up with the latest technologies Jotform PERKS High growth-paced environment with collaborative and unique team culture Generous market competitive total compensation package Health Insurance Professional Growth & Career Opportunities: We support your personal and professional development with educational materials and expenses & relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends & online courses or coaching - and support you pursuing ones that you are passionate about! Challenging projects, regular feedback, healthy competition Fun & Relax working environment: When we’re in the office; music, jeans and t-shirts are the norm & kitchens stocked with healthy & tasty snacks & drinks OUR PROCESS We’ll review your application along with all the others we receive and pick the top profiles for a screening call. In many cases due to time constraints and our candidate volume, only the short-listed candidates are contacted but we do consider each application carefully. If you have been selected as a short-listed candidate, we will contact you for a short screening call to get to know you better. If you don’t get a call, please don’t be disappointed! We receive many applications for each role and have to prioritize who we speak to. Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Jotform! Jotform is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. https://www.jotform.com/job-applicant-privacy/

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for Fullstack Developers to join our brilliant team Decription We are seeking an experienced full-stack developer to join our team and contribute to the development of features for harmony ecosystem. As a software developer, you will play a key role in building and enhancing the functionality of our ecosystem. You will work closely with our engineering team to design, implement, and optimize new features, ensuring a seamless and efficient development experience. Requirements Strong proficiency in JavaScript/Typescript programming languages Proficiency in server-side languages (Node.js, Java) Familiarity with modern frontend frameworks (React, Angular, Vue.js) Knowledge of responsive design principles Strong proficiency with version control systems Understanding of CI/CD practices and tools Experience in Agile/Scrum, good communication skills and the ability to work well in a team Self-motivated; independent, organized and proactive; highly responsive, flexible, and adaptable when working across multiple teams Good knowledge in written and spoken English Experience in Unit Testing (e.g. Jest, Jasmine, Karma) Personal Skills Required Agile oriented; focused on delivery and customer first. Adaptive; responsive for on-demand changes. Dedicated; working hard to finish tasks on-time with high quality. Communicative; calling before sending e-mail. Open; collecting feedbacks and defining actions for self-improve Have a good level of English knowledge, Paying attention to details, thinking carefully and analytically, Documentation discipline

title: Backend Developer Intern (Node.js)
description: Job Title: Backend Developer Intern (Node.js) About the Role We are looking for a highly motivated and curious Backend Developer Intern to join our growing engineering team. If you are passionate about building scalable web applications, working with modern tech stacks, and want to gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced environment, this is the place for you! As an intern, you will work closely with our core team to design, develop, and maintain server-side logic, ensuring high performance and responsiveness to requests from the front-end. What You Will Do Assist in the development of server-side components using Node.js . Work with databases (PostgreSQL/NoSQL) to optimize data storage and retrieval. Collaborate with the team to integrate third-party APIs and services. Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code. Participate in code reviews and team brainstorming sessions. Help troubleshoot and debug application issues. What We Are Looking For Currently enrolled in or recently graduated from a Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field. Solid understanding of JavaScript (ES6+) . Basic knowledge of Node.js and frameworks like Express.js . Familiarity with RESTful APIs and asynchronous programming. Understanding of database fundamentals (SQL or NoSQL). Knowledge of Version Control Systems (Git). A "can-do" attitude and a strong desire to learn new technologies. Bonus Points (Nice to Have) Experience with TypeScript . Familiarity with Cloud services (AWS, Google Cloud, or Vercel). Knowledge of Backend-as-a-Service tools like Supabase . Interest in automation tools (e.g., n8n) or e-commerce integrations. What We Offer Hands-on experience with real-world projects and a modern tech stack. Mentorship from experienced developers. A collaborative and supportive remote/hybrid work environment. The opportunity to make a tangible impact on a growing platform. How to Apply If you’re ready to kickstart your career and build something cool, send us your CV and a link to your GitHub profile or portfolio! #Hiring #NodeJS #BackendDeveloper #Internship #SoftwareEngineering #TechJobs

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: MapperX, a pioneer in the renewable energy sector, is dedicated to providing revolutionary solutions in solar panel analysis and aims to enhance energy efficiency. Our software optimizes the performance of solar panels and improves energy production processes. We are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer to join our team in Ankara and contribute to this vision. Qualifications: - Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering or a related field - At least 2 years of experience in Full Stack Development - Advanced proficiency in React, Next.js (App Router, Server Components), and TypeScript - Strong knowledge of Node.js, Express.js, REST API design, and backend development - Solid experience with Firestore (NoSQL data modeling, queries, security rules) and Firebase Auth (JWT, OTP/2FA) - Proficiency in Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, and Radix UI component-based development - Experience with state management using Zustand, TanStack Query, and React Hook Form with Zod validation - Solid understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and SOLID principles - Familiarity with Google Cloud Platform, Firebase (Hosting, Functions, Storage), and Cloud Run technologies - Experience with Mapbox GL, Leaflet, or PostGIS for geospatial/map-based applications is a plus - Experience with payment gateway integration (Iyzico or similar 3D Secure flows) is a plus - Familiarity with internationalization frameworks (next-intl) for multi-language applications is a plus - Experience with SendGrid, TipTap/Monaco editors, or PDF generation (@react-pdf/renderer) is a plus Responsibilities: - Develop and maintain features across our customer-facing solar panel analysis platform, backend API, and internal admin panel - Build responsive, accessible UI components and implement REST API endpoints with proper authentication and authorization - Work with Firestore data models, integrate third-party services (payments, email, geospatial APIs), and support 11-language internationalization - Produce innovative software solutions and actively participate in projects that advance solar energy analytics If you are interested in contributing to projects that make a difference in the industry and want to be part of the energy transition, we invite you to apply. Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview. #FullStackDeveloper #ReactJS #NextJS #TypeScript #NodeJS #Firebase #Firestore #WebDevelopment #SoftwareEngineer #postgresql #BackendDeveloper #GoogleCloud #CloudRun #ankara

title: Backend Engineer - Integrations
description: About Us At Tightly, we’re building a platform that helps e-commerce and D2C brands manage and optimise their most valuable asset—capital. Our AI-driven platform helps businesses optimise inventory replenishment, streamline supplier communications, and unlock flexible revenue-based financing. We’re not just solving a problem; we’re creating a new category of software that helps businesses optimise their capital for sustainable growth. What We’re Building Tightly integrates deeply with the systems that power modern commerce—ERPs like NetSuite and SAP, e-commerce platforms like Shopify and WooCommerce, warehouse management systems, and more. These integrations are the connective tissue of our platform, enabling real-time data flow that powers our inventory intelligence, demand forecasting, and replenishment engine. Your Role As a Backend Engineer on the Integrations team in Türkiye, you’ll be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining the custom integrations that connect Tightly to our customers’ tech stacks. You’ll work with ERP systems (NetSuite, SAP), e-commerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento), WMS providers, and other third-party services. Beyond integrations, you’ll support the broader backend team on platform features, performance improvements, and infrastructure work. You’ll collaborate closely with product, frontend, and data teams to deliver reliable, scalable solutions. What You’ll Do Design, develop, and maintain custom integrations with ERPs (NetSuite, SAP), e-commerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento), and WMS/3PL systems Build and optimise data pipelines that synchronise inventory, orders, and financial data across multiple systems in real time Develop robust API connectors with proper error handling, retry logic, and monitoring Troubleshoot and resolve integration issues, working directly with partner APIs and documentation Contribute to the core backend platform—building features, improving performance, and writing clean, testable code Collaborate with product and engineering teams to scope integration requirements and technical approaches Write comprehensive tests and maintain documentation for all integration modules Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and continuous improvement of engineering practices Minimum Qualifications BS/MS degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field 3+ years of experience in backend software development Strong proficiency in Python with solid understanding of OOP, design patterns, and test-driven development Hands-on experience building and maintaining API integrations with third-party systems (ERPs, e-commerce platforms, or SaaS products) Experience with Docker and container orchestration (Kubernetes) Proficiency with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Redis) Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, webhooks, OAuth, and common integration patterns Ability to read and work with third-party API documentation independently Preferred Qualifications Experience integrating with NetSuite (SuiteTalk/REST), SAP, Shopify, or similar enterprise platforms Familiarity with cloud providers, particularly AWS (Lambda, SQS, S3, RDS) Experience with message queues, event-driven architectures, or ETL pipelines Knowledge of data mapping, transformation, and normalisation across disparate systems Exposure to monitoring and observability tools (Datadog, CloudWatch, Sentry) Mindset A creative problem-solver who thrives in a fast-paced, dynamic environment Detail-oriented with a strong sense of ownership—you care about getting integrations right Collaborative and proactive, comfortable working across teams and time zones Curious about e-commerce operations and eager to understand how businesses use the systems you integrate with Passionate about clean code, reliability, and continuous improvement What We Offer Competitive salary paid in USD—your hard work deserves real rewards. Comprehensive health benefits, because your well-being is our priority. Monthly food card to keep you fueled and focused. Complimentary gym memberships or sports club access, so you can stay active and energized. Quarterly onsite weeks packed with memorable team activities, networking opportunities, and exciting surprises. A $500 annual learning & development budget—because we invest in your growth. The chance to work with a global, diverse, ambitious team driven by innovation and collaboration. Flexible working arrangements—work from home or wherever you’re most productive. Ownership and autonomy from day one, with direct product impact. Regular team-building events, from happy hours to cultural experiences. Cutting-edge tools and tech to help you excel in your role. A dynamic, fast-paced environment where no two days are the same. If you’re ready to build the integrations that power modern commerce, let’s talk!

title: freelance Next.js - Nest.js full stack
description: Lütfen aşağıdaki şartlara uygun adaylar başvursunlar. Hemen başlayacak 5+ Yıl Deneyimli Senior Next.js Developer Arıyoruz! Önemli: Lütfen yalnızca belirtilen tüm gereksinimleri karşılayan adaylar başvuru yapsın. 5 yıldan az deneyimi olan adayların başvurmaması rica olunur. Freelance çalışacak uzmanlarda alınacaktır. Pozisyon: Senior Full Stack Developer (Öncelik: Next.js-Nest.js) Ekibimize, büyük ölçekli ve uzun vadeli projelerde aktif rol alacak, özellikle Next.js tarafında güçlü ve deneyimli bir takım arkadaşı arıyoruz. Yüksek performanslı, ölçeklenebilir ve modern teknolojilerle geliştirilmiş projelerde çalışmaktan keyif alıyorsanız, aradığımız kişi siz olabilirsiniz. Zorunlu Nitelikler Minimum 5 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimi Next.js konusunda ileri seviye ve gerçek proje deneyimi Nest.js hakkında güçlü bilgi PostgreSQL ile aktif çalışma deneyimi TanStack React Query ile uygulamalı proje tecrübesi Büyük ve karmaşık projelerde görev almış olmak Temiz kod prensiplerine hakimiyet Güçlü analitik düşünme ve problem çözme yeteneği Tercih Sebepleri DevOps bilgisi (CI/CD süreçleri, deployment, sunucu yönetimi vb.) GraphQL deneyimi Projelerimiz Turhost da fiziki sunucularımızda bulunmaktadır. Test ortamı için ve canlı için birer sunucumuz mevcuttur. Uzman arkadaşla yapacağımız sözleşmede belirteceğimiz gibi ay içinde hiç bir hizmet alınmasa veya dört günden az ihtiyaç olsa bile ay sonunda (4) dört günlük 10,000 TL (onbinlira) ödeme yapılacaktır. Eğer ay içinde aldığımız hizmet gün sayısı artarsa gün sayısı x 2500TL olarak ödeme yapılacaktır. Çalışma trelloda kayıtlı maddeler size gösterilir ne kadar zamanda yapılacaklarını birlikte belirleyip başlanacak veya zoom üzerinde saat 09,00-12,30/13,30-18,00 arasında ekran paylaşılarak çalışılacaktır. Yetkili soru sorduğunda yaptıklarını söyleyecek ve gün sonunda bitirdiklerini raporlayacaktır . Sunduğumuz İmkanlar Büyük ölçekli ve gerçek dünya projelerinde aktif rol Uzun vadeli iş birliği Profesyonel ve gelişim odaklı çalışma ortamı Stabil ve düzenli iş yükü Eğer tüm gereksinimleri karşılıyorsanız ve özellikle Next.js tarafında güçlü bir Senior Developer iseniz, başvurunuzu bekliyoruz. Tekrar hatırlatma: 5 yıldan az deneyimi olan adayların başvurmaması rica olunur.

title: Talent Pool: Frontend, Backend, PM & HR
description: Talent Pool - Multiple Tech Positions 📍 Remote/Hybrid | 💼 Full-time | 📅 Planned period: 2026 Q3-Q4 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ⚠️ THIS IS A TALENT POOL POSTING There are no active positions at this time. We are building a talent pool for multiple roles that will open in 2026 Q3-Q4. All applicants will receive a small surprise as a thank you. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🎯 OPEN ROLES We're looking for talented individuals in the following areas: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ FRONTEND DEVELOPER - 2+ years with React/Vue/Angular - Modern CSS (Tailwind/Styled Components) - REST API integration - Responsive design experience Nice to have: TypeScript, Next.js, Testing ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ BACKEND DEVELOPER - 2+ years with Node.js/Python/Java/Go - RESTful API design and development - PostgreSQL/MongoDB experience - Microservices architecture understanding Nice to have: Docker/K8s, AWS/GCP, CI/CD ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ PRODUCT MANAGER - 3+ years in Product Management - Product strategy and roadmap management - Agile/Scrum (Product Owner experience) - User research and data analysis - Cross-functional team management Nice to have: B2B/SaaS, SQL, Growth hacking ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ HUMAN RESOURCES SPECIALIST - 2+ years in HR - Recruitment process management - Performance evaluation systems - Employee relations management - HR systems experience Nice to have: Tech recruitment, Employer brand ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🏢 ABOUT US CodeLuma is a product-focused technology studio that designs, builds, and grows its own digital products. We work across mobile, web, and AI, owning the entire journey from idea to scale. Our stack includes Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, and cloud-based infrastructure. We're a small, fast-moving team that values clean architecture, ownership, and building scalable systems that last. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📝 HOW TO APPLY Send your CV, LinkedIn profile, and GitHub/GitLab links to info@codeluma.com Please specify which position(s) you're interested in.

title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: CTO (Flutter + Node.js) Aranıyor | FitBul
description: Fitbul, spora başlamak isteyen ya da spor alışkanlığı kazanmak isteyen ancak motivasyon bulamayan kişilere  yenilikçi bir çözüm sunan bir mobil uygulamadır. Amacımız, sporu herkes için erişilebilir ve sosyal hale getirmek. Kurucu ekibimize katılacak bir Full-Stack Mobile App Developer (CTO) arıyoruz. Aradığımız Profil Flutter ile mobil uygulama geliştirme deneyimi (production-level tercih sebebi) Node.js ile backend geliştirme deneyimi REST API, authentication, real-time features ve veritabanı mimarisi konularında yetkinlik Mobil uygulamayı ölçeklenebilir bir yapıda kurgulayabilecek teknik liderlik Ürünü MVP’den büyüme aşamasına taşıyabilecek vizyon Takım çalışmasına yatkın, iletişimi güçlü Startup dinamiklerine uyumlu, sorumluluk alan ve çözüm odaklı Rol ve Sorumluluklar Mobil uygulamanın teknik mimarisini sahiplenmek Flutter tabanlı frontend geliştirme sürecini yönetmek Node.js backend altyapısını kurmak ve ölçeklendirmek Güvenli ve performanslı bir eşleşme (matching) sistemi geliştirmek Teknik yol haritasını oluşturmak ve geliştirme sürecini yönetmek Pozisyon Yapısı Bu rol, gelir üretimi öncesi aşamadaki ürün geliştirme sürecinde ekip katkısı esasına dayanır. Startupın mevcut aşaması nedeniyle bu pozisyonda şu an için gönüllülük esasına dayanmaktadır. Gerçek bir ürünün backend mimarisinde yer almak, sorumluluk almak, referans ve deneyim kazanmak isteyen geliştiriciler için uygundur. Sunduğumuz BTM (Bilgiyi Ticarileştirme Merkezi) desteği (ofis imkânları, yatırımcı ağlarına erişim, mentorluk ve danışmanlık) Aylık gelişim programları ve networking etkinlikleri Yaratıcı, özgür ve vizyoner bir girişimcilik ortamı Ürünün erken aşamasında teknik lider olarak konumlanma fırsatı 📩 İletişim: fitbul.app@gmail.com

title: Freelance (Hourly) Full‑stack Developer (.NET Core + React/Next.js)
description: Company Description Leptes is a software development company serving EU clients. We build modern web apps primarily on .NET Core , SQL Server , React and Next.js . Engagement & Location Type: Long‑term freelance / contractor (hourly) Hours: 20–40 h/week (flexible) with 3–4h overlap with CET Location: Remote (Turkey) Start: ASAP Compensation & Invoicing Rate: Hourly Rate + TR VAT (KDV) Invoicing: Monthly (TR invoice required). Payments via bank transfer/Wise. What you’ll do Design, develop and maintain .NET 6–9 backend services and REST APIs. Build responsive UI with React (Hooks + Redux) and TypeScript ; contribute to Next.js features (SSR/App Router, API routes, Auth.js/NextAuth). Work with Entity Framework Core and SQL Server (schema design, queries, tuning). Write clean, testable code; participate in code reviews and follow Git/CI/CD practices. Collaborate with PMs/designers, refine requirements, estimate tasks and deliver iteratively. Must‑haves 4+ years work experience as full-stack development 4+ years in .NET (C#, .NET 6–9, EF Core, .Net MVC). 2–4+ years building SPAs with React and 2+ years with TypeScript . Azure development environment (DevOps, Entra, BlobStorage, etc.) Solid SQL skills on MSSQL . Working English (B2+) for daily standups and async written communications Must be located in Türkiye Candidates must be able to issue invoices for their work. Nice to have Experience with testing (xUnit/Jest), performance profiling, and caching Next.js experience (SSR, App Router, API routes; Auth.js/NextAuth). Knowledge of Azure AI (Open AI, AI Foundry) DevOps basics (Docker, CI/CD). Legacy front‑end exposure (jQuery/AJAX) for maintenance cases. Security/GDPR awareness.

title: Frontend Developer - Vue.js (Hybrid)
description: Job Description We are seeking a Frontend Developer with strong expertise in Vue.js and solid knowledge of WebRTC technologies . The ideal candidate will have experience developing secure, real-time web applications—preferably in online exam systems or security-focused platforms. Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain secure Single Page Applications (SPA) using Vue.js Implement real-time communication features with WebRTC Build and manage frontend-based monitoring and proctoring features Integrate authentication and identity verification systems Ensure browser security controls (tab switching detection, full-screen enforcement, copy/paste blocking, etc.) Optimize performance, scalability, and cross-browser compatibility Requirements Strong experience with Vue.js Good understanding of WebRTC Experience building Single Page Applications (SPA) (Angular / React knowledge is a plus) Ability to implement frontend security and monitoring features such as: Video, audio, and screen recording Browser tab and full-screen control Copy/paste and right-click restrictions Web traffic monitoring Secondary camera and screen detection Identity verification Virtual machine detection If you are passionate about building secure and real-time web applications, we would love to hear from you! Amaris Consulting is committed to promoting diversity within its workforce and to creating an inclusive work environment. We consider applications from all qualified individuals, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnic origin, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or any other characteristic. Special attention will be given to candidates with disabilities.
